title: sphaeroma gayanum
intro: Sphaeroma gayanum, also known as the 'sphaeroma plant' or 'sea pill-bug plant', is a type of plant that belongs to the family of Sphaeromatidae, which is actually a type of isopod crustacean, not a plant as I initially said. However, Sphaeroma gayanum can be confused with the sea pill-bug plant which is often used as a substitute. I can't reply on the health benefits and medicinal properties of Sphaeroma gayanum as it is actually an isopod crustacean.
